---
title: "Établi Nuage"
sidebar: en
---

<img src="../_icons/icon-nuage.svg" alt="" width="80" align="right" style="margin:0 0 1rem 1rem;">

<span class="etabli-badge">Self-hosted client</span>

> Your own Nextcloud — files, contacts, calendar, link checker — in one app.

**Status: in development.** The app bundles four Nextcloud modules under one account. Files (WebDAV) and the Link Checker already round-trip; Contacts (CardDAV) and Calendar (CalDAV) are in progress. Établi Nuage only talks to the configured Nextcloud instance and is not affiliated with Nextcloud GmbH.

![Nuage on Android — the not-connected home before a server is configured.](../_screens/0.1.0/01-login.png){width=320}

## Who benefits

Anyone self-hosting Nextcloud who wants to reach files, contacts and calendar on the go without juggling several official apps — and who additionally values the Link Checker (for maintaining a URL list with status synced back to Nextcloud).

## Platforms

| Platform | Status |
|----------|--------|
| iOS      | ✓      |
| Android  | ✓      |

## Privacy

No analytics, no third-party SDKs. Sign-in happens on your self-hosted Nextcloud server. Credentials (server URL + app password) live only in the platform secure store (iOS Keychain · Android EncryptedSharedPreferences) and only go to the configured instance.

## Installation

Établi Nuage is **under active development** (Contacts/CardDAV and Calendar/CalDAV are still being finished). There are no App Store, Google Play or F-Droid releases yet.

| Channel | Status |
|---------|--------|
| Android (APK) | **Development build** via [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/etabli-dev/etabli-nuage/releases) |
| App Store (iOS) | planned — not yet available |
| Google Play | planned — not yet available |
| F-Droid | planned — not yet available |

Details: see [Getting Started](getting-started.qmd).

## Origin

Nuage is the continuation of **EtabliProbe** (originally a pure WebDAV-based link checker). The Link Checker is now one of four modules.

## Support

If you find the app useful: [Liberapay](https://liberapay.com/rabanheller/).
